# zstack_l2vxlan_network (Resource)

Manages an L2 VXLAN network in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the L2 VXLAN network.
- `pool_uuid` (String) The UUID of the VXLAN pool.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the L2 VXLAN network.
- `vni` (Number) The VXLAN Network Identifier (VNI).
- `zone_uuid` (String) The UUID of the zone.

### Read-Only

- `physical_interface` (String) The physical interface of the L2 VXLAN network.
- `type` (String) The type of the L2 VXLAN network.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the L2 VXLAN network.
